description: Decompose an epic into implementable child beads: discover scope, explore codebase, prepare subtask plan, mint beads

steps.title: Discover epic scope
steps.description: Dispatch architect child to understand the full scope of epic {{epic_id}}: read beads, gather strategic context, identify acceptance criteria, existing children, dependency context, and related architecture documents

steps.title: Explore codebase
steps.description: Dispatch architect child to perform deep structural and semantic analysis of the implementation surface for epic {{epic_id}}: map relevant code architecture, existing patterns, test infrastructure, files to create or modify, and risk assessment

steps.title: Prepare subtask plan
steps.description: Dispatch architect child to design the subtask decomposition for epic {{epic_id}} via sequential thinking: output an ordered subtask list where each subtask has title, type, priority, description, files, verification, and sibling dependencies

steps.title: Mint child beads
steps.description: Parent mints child beads from prepare output: bd create --parent {{epic_id}} for each subtask, wire sibling dependencies with bd dep add, verify graph with bd show {{epic_id}}, export with bd export
